headline: Engage for Good Announces 2026 Halo Award Winners, Honoring Corporate-Nonprofit Partnerships
summary: FedEx and Orbis International Named Best of the Best PALM SPRINGS, CA / ACCESS Newswire / April 24, 2026 / Last night, Engage for Good announced the winners of the 2026 Halo Awards, recognizing 28 gold and silver recipients across 14 categories for ...

headline: FedEx (FDX) Valuation Check After Strong Multi Period Share Price Momentum
summary: FedEx stock snapshot and recent return profile FedEx (FDX) has drawn fresh attention after a strong run, with the share price last closing at $392.69. Investors are weighing this level against the company’s recent performance and broader return history. Over the past month, FedEx shares have returned 9.09%, while the past 3 months show a 29.09% return. The stock’s 1 year total return stands at 86.11%, with 3 year and 5 year total returns of 85.11% and 46.23% respectively. Year to date, FedEx...
